# Visual Studio Code

<div align="center">

![Screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OfficialCRUGG/dotfiles/main/images/vscode-1.png)

</div>

Visual Studio Code (VSC) is my primary IDE.

I am using Visual Studio Code **`1.72.0`** for `arm64`

## Configuration

-   Color Theme: `poimandres`
    -   Dark: `poimandres`
    -   Light: `Min Light`
-   Product Icon Theme: `fluent-icons`
-   File Icon Theme: `quill-icons`
-   Editor Font: `JetBrains Mono`

### More:

-   [settings.json (User Settings)](https://github.com/OfficialCRUGG/dotfiles/blob/main/.vscode/settings.json)
-   [Extensions List](https://github.com/OfficialCRUGG/dotfiles/blob/main/.vscode/extensions)
-   [Extension install script](https://github.com/OfficialCRUGG/dotfiles/blob/main/.vscode/install_extensions.sh)
